title: Dark Twilight
body:
Requires CIT Resewn or Variants CIT Both on Fabric,
For Forge Optifine Should work,
(Note with variants cit, the item itself wont actually matter)

Renaming a Tool or Weapon will Give a different texture depending on the name


Twilight (Iron, Diamond, or Netherite Sword)![Twilight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb6c448f453b79eaeaa73055f09f8238ba5f62a8_0.webp)

Justitia (Iron, Diamond, or Netherite Sword)![Justitia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c55416c0b687aedff4ffd98be08b49f2cba7bb9_0.webp)

Mimicry (Iron, Diamond, or Netherite Sword)![Mimicry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a402c2a25ccd11e18318b57d92995752617f7c86_0.webp)

Penitience (Wooden or Stone Sword)![Penitience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a8090f192dcb285bfa9c6a1f01f262aa43eec9d_0.webp)

Lamp (Iron, Diamond, or Netherite Axe)![Lamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d82007d7db4900d7d4035afd68dede7990f17b0_0.webp)
